description: Accent palette metadata and optional brand softening for light/dark appearance. Each scheme id matches data-color-scheme and scheme-hue-defs.ts. light/dark: use 0 to skip CSS overrides; otherwise an object with inherit:true (use mixTiers below) or explicit upTo200, upTo400, from500 (integers 0–100: share of that palette’s neutral-500 mixed into brand steps 50–200, 300–400, 500–900 in srgb).

mixTiers.description: Default neutral-500 mix percentages per brand step band when a scheme sets light or dark to { "inherit": true }.

schemes.label: Neptune — moonstone blue
schemes.description: Cool blue accent (default). Pairs with slate-tinted neutrals in colors.json.

schemes.label: Aurora — emerald green
schemes.description: Green / teal accent from the Aurora scale; calmer on light backgrounds than warm hues.

schemes.label: Helios — amber / gold
schemes.description: Warm yellow–amber accent (Helios scale). Often softened in light mode so HUD chrome is less loud.

schemes.label: Nebula — violet / purple
schemes.description: Purple accent (Nebula scale) with violet-leaning neutrals.

light.description: Slightly stronger neutral mix than default — purple reads harsh on light gray.

schemes.label: Redshift — rose / red
schemes.description: Red / rose accent (Redshift scale) with stone-tinted warm neutrals.

schemes.label: Titan — orange
schemes.description: Orange accent (Titan scale) with neutral grays.
